# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover handmade surf gear built for real wave riders at Peace Surfers, your ultimate hobies surf shop alternative. Shop artisan boards, gear &amp; ocean-lifestyle goods today.

### Craftsmanship
https://example.com/craftsmanship
Explore the art behind every product at Peace Surfers. Our wavelength surf shop-inspired craftsmanship blends raw surf culture with handmade precision. Feel the difference quality makes.

### About
https://example.com/about
Peace Surfers isn&#39;t just a surf store — it&#39;s a movement. Learn how our passion for the waves and the surf community shaped an innerlight surf shop spirit into every handmade piece we create.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Got questions about our handmade surf gear? Reach out to the Peace Surfers crew — your local hobies surf shop connection — and let&#39;s find the perfect product for your next session.
